description:
Comprehensive Hardware Analysis, Monitoring and Reporting for Windows and DOS.


- Added fan speed monitoring on MSI Claw 8.
- Improved Intel Nova Lake support.
- Enhanced sensor monitoring on Maxsun 275HX series.
- Updated Intel PresentMon.
- Added monitoring of measured Core, Memory and XBAR clocks on NVIDIA GPUs.
- Fixed lost Custom and WHEA sensors.
- Added reporting of ACPI version.
- Improved Corsair Link device support.
- Added Display Audio monitor capability information.
- Added option to change OSD background color.
- Fixed recognition of AMD Radeon RX 6500XT.
- Fixed a possible crash when sensor name is too long.
